goog.module('jsmethod.JsMethodExample.AbstractTypeImpl$impl');

const AbstractTypeExposingJsMethod = goog.require('jsmethod.JsMethodExample.AbstractTypeExposingJsMethod$impl');
const $Util = goog.require('nativebootstrap.Util$impl');

class AbstractTypeImpl extends AbstractTypeExposingJsMethod {
 /** @protected @nodts */
 constructor() {
  super();
 }
 /** @nodts @return {!AbstractTypeImpl} */
 static $create__() {
  AbstractTypeImpl.$clinit();
  let $instance = new AbstractTypeImpl();
  $instance.$ctor__jsmethod_JsMethodExample_AbstractTypeImpl__void();
  return $instance;
 }
 /** @nodts */
 $ctor__jsmethod_JsMethodExample_AbstractTypeImpl__void() {
  this.$ctor__jsmethod_JsMethodExample_AbstractTypeExposingJsMethod__void();
 }
 /** @override */
 abstractJsMethod(/** ?string */ s) {}
 /** @nodts */
 static $clinit() {
  AbstractTypeImpl.$clinit = () =>{};
  AbstractTypeImpl.$loadModules();
  AbstractTypeExposingJsMethod.$clinit();
 }
 /** @nodts @return {boolean} */
 static $isInstance(/** ? */ instance) {
  return instance instanceof AbstractTypeImpl;
 }
 
 /** @nodts */
 static $loadModules() {}
}
$Util.$setClassMetadata(AbstractTypeImpl, 'jsmethod.JsMethodExample$AbstractTypeImpl');

exports = AbstractTypeImpl;
